title: VibeFlow: Lovable, n8n and a database all in one platform | Y Combinator
full_text:
VibeFlow: AI content manager that grows your company's online presence | Y Combinator
Home › Companies › VibeFlow
VibeFlow
AI content manager that grows your company's online presence
Summer 2025
Active
Artificial Intelligence
Developer Tools
Consumer
B2B
San Francisco
https://vibeflow.ai/
AI content manager that grows your company's online presence
VibeFlow is the AI content manager for startups. Anyone can build a company in a weekend now, but nobody knows how to distribute it. Existing AI tools spit out generic, off-brand content you can't really use. VibeFlow learns your brand, voice, and goals, then autonomously creates on-brand, tailored posts (with visuals) ready to publish. VibeFlow is the AI growth engine that turns ideas into distribution.
Active Founders
Alessia Paccagnella
Founder
Cofounder @ VibeFlow (S25).
Prev. Software Engineer @ Esri (world's leading developer of geographic information systems (GIS) software - I led the design and development of a new visual programming tool for 3D procedural modelling, thought to make procedural creation accessible to people without coding experience).
MSc in Computer Science ETHZ (#4 World).
Alessia Paccagnella
Founder
Cofounder @ VibeFlow (S25).
Prev. Software Engineer @ Esri (world's leading developer of geographic information systems (GIS) software - I led the design and development of a new visual programming tool for 3D procedural modelling, thought to make procedural creation accessible to people without coding experience).
MSc in Computer Science ETHZ (#4 World).
Elia Saquand
Founder
Co-founder of VibeFlow (S25). Prev. Founding Engineer at a VC-backed startup building prompt-to-graph tools for non-technical users. Research in Clinical AI at Stanford, built high-speed perception systems at Sony AI, and accelerated AlphaFold training by 10x at InstaDeep while maintaining 95% accuracy (NeurIPS ‘22). MSc in Data Science from ETH Zürich.
Elia Saquand
Founder
Co-founder of VibeFlow (S25). Prev. Founding Engineer at a VC-backed startup building prompt-to-graph tools for non-technical users. Research in Clinical AI at Stanford, built high-speed perception systems at Sony AI, and accelerated AlphaFold training by 10x at InstaDeep while maintaining 95% accuracy (NeurIPS ‘22). MSc in Data Science from ETH Zürich.
Latest News
Vibeflow secures $500K pre-seed funding for full-stack app platform / AI World
Sep 20, 2025
Turning Vibe Coding into Production-Ready Development: Inside Elia Saquand and Alessia Paccagnella's Journey to build VibeFlow
Sep 19, 2025
6 Exciting AI Vibe Coding Tools From YC Demo Day Summer 2025 Startups - Business Insider
Sep 17, 2025
The Most Promising Startups To Watch From YC Summer 2025 Batch
Sep 03, 2025
Company Launches
VibeFlow: Full-stack prompt to app with visual workflows
See original launch post
TL;DR
We are Lovable, but better because the backends we generate actually work and are easy to debug and evolve.
https://youtu.be/bjpR5A-Ib6k
Who We Are
We're Alessia and Elia, Computer Science and Data Science graduates from Stanford and ETH Zürich. We've spent years as full-stack engineers building no-code tools that empower non-technical users to create complex systems. Now we're using that experience to help anyone become a full-stack developer through AI.
The Problem
Prompt-to-app tools like Lovable are incredible at generating beautiful frontends, but they completely fall apart when you need real business logic, integrations, or debugging capabilities.
Here's what every developer using these tools faces:
Black box backends: you can't see or understand what the AI actually built for your server-side logic
Debugging nightmare: when something breaks, you're stuck re-prompting the LLM and hoping it magically fixes the issue
Integration hell: you're forced to manually stitch together Lovable + n8n + Supabase + other tools, creating fragile workflows that break easily and are painful to maintain
This affects thousands of developers who want to build real applications but get stuck when they move beyond simple prototypes.
Our Solution
VibeFlow transforms prompts into full-stack applications where every single component, frontend AND backend, is visible, understandable, and editable.
How it works:
Visual Backend Editor: See and edit your app's backend logic like you'd design a UI in Figma. You can edit visually or continue using prompts.
Transparent AI Generation: Unlike other tools, you can see and understand what the AI built, making debugging straightforward
Powerful Integrations: Built-in database and prewired service connections, no external tools required.
All-in-One Platform: Build, debug, deploy, and maintain everything in one cohesive environment
How We Got Here
We saw builders doing hacky workarounds, connecting n8n and Supabase to power Lovable frontends, creating Frankenstein apps where they didn't even own half the pieces. People were desperate for backend control but stuck with fragmented solutions.
Get in Touch
Build your full-stack app with VibeFlow : https://app.vibeflow.ai/
Join our Discord : https://discord.com/invite/Ctm2A2uEaq
Book a 15-min call : https://vibeflow.cal.com/founders/15min (we'll help you build something cool!)
Newsletter : https://vibeflow.ai
Ready to build full-stack apps that actually work? Try VibeFlow today and see the difference transparent AI development makes!
